title: alnus fruticosa f. pubescens
intro: Alnus fruticosa f. pubescens is a variant of the green alder shrub, a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Alnus fruticosa f. pubescens include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and boost the immune system. Alnus fruticosa f. pubescens is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, although its use may vary depending on the region and cultural practices.
